svg.text: Blind synthetic-confidence trend, trailing five-loop average, deltas, and reviewer disagreement (#6). Lower is better.
1. Blind reviewer scores and five-loop rolling average
Blue band is min-max reviewer range; black line is trailing 5-loop blind average.
Red cells are higher synthetic-confidence scores.
Negative bars are improvements; positive bars are regressions.
Top line is max reviewer score, bottom line min reviewer score, blue line is spread.
Generated from loop scores.json artifacts. Blind scores are synthetic-confidence values; lower is more realistic.
